mapper.select: select a.id, 'AUC-' || lpad(a.id::text, 3, '0') as auction_code, a.starting_price, a.bid_increment, a.final_price, a.bid_count, ( select count(distinct b.member_id) from tbl_bid b where b.auction_id = a.id ) as participant_count, to_char(a.started_at, 'YY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as started_at, to_char(a.closing_at, 'YY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as closing_at, w.title as work_title, sm.nickname as artist_name, w.category, wm.nickname as winner_name, case a.status when 'SOLD' then '낙찰' when 'CLOSED' then '유찰' else a.status end as status, a.fee_rate, a.fee_amount, s.net_amount as settlement_amount, p.status as payment_status, s.status as settlement_status from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id join tbl_member sm on a.seller_id = sm.id left join tbl_member wm on a.winner_id = wm.id left join tbl_payment p on p.auction_id = a.id left join tbl_settlement s on s.payment_id = p.id where a.id = #{id}
